flash.recognize:
Formula flashcard — which is correct for:
{front}?
q.circ_c: The ward has a circular green Jell-O “ring of fire” mold with radius {r} inches (a culinary classic at every potluck from Provo to Pocatello). What is its circumference? {pi_note}
q.circ_a: A circular sacrament-meeting clock face (the one that miraculously slows during talks) has radius {r}. What is its area? {pi_note}
q.soup: Relief Society is canning a legendary cylinder of funeral potatoes. The base is {d} inches across (diameter) and the can is {h} inches high. (If Nephi could build a ship, you can find a volume.) What is the volume? {pi_note}
q.map_to_real: A youth pioneer-trek map uses a scale of 1 inch : {scaleFt} feet. The rest stop (where they rediscover the joy of socks) is {inches} inches away on the map. How many feet down the trail is it?
q.real_to_map: A ward “Book of Mormon lands” activity map has scale 1 inch : {scaleFt} feet. A landmark labeled “Zarahemla? (maybe)” is {feet} feet down the trail. How many inches away is it on the map? Round to the nearest hundredth if needed.
q.carpet_cmp: Relief Society is comparing carpet options for a {L}'×{W}' room (the one with the mysterious “temporary” craft closet from 1998). Option A: {rollW}'-wide roll at ${costLin}/linear ft. Option B: ${costYd}/sq yd. Which is cheaper?
q.pizza_cmp: Mutual night pizza debate: which has more pizza area—two {small}-inch personal pizzas or one {large}-inch pizza? (Think feeding the multitude, but with cheese. {pi_note})
q.compare_sd: {which}: {ds}. Approximate the standard deviation using the range rule of thumb.
q.zscore: A seminary quiz has mean {mean} and standard deviation {sd}. What is the z-score for a score of {score}? Round to the nearest hundredth. (Seek learning by study and also by… z.)
q.emp_2sd: Years of church membership for adults in a ward are roughly normal with mean {mean} and SD {sd}. About what percentage fall between {lo} and {hi}?
q.emp_below: Missionary ages in a (made-up, PG) data set are roughly normal with mean {mean} and SD {sd}. About what percentage are younger than {cut}?
q.fence_roll: Ammon is fencing a garden plot {ft1}' {in1}" by {ft2}' {in2}" (smaller than King Lamoni’s fields, thankfully). Fencing comes in 50-ft or 100-ft rolls at the Deseret Industries hardware aisle. Which roll do you need?
q.drive_slope: The stake-center driveway rises {rise} ft over a horizontal distance of {run} ft—steeper than a new missionary’s learning curve. What is the slope? Write as a simplified ratio rise:run or as a fraction rise/run.
q.drive_len: Lehi’s family, if they had asphalt, might have used a driveway that rises {rise} ft over a horizontal distance of {run} ft. What is the slant length of that driveway? Round to the nearest hundredth. (Hint from Alma: have faith—and use √(a² + b²).)
